permission.notice: U-Ellie udinga ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni ukuze ezwe imibuzo yakho.

status.wakeWordUnavailable: Igama lokuvusa alitholakali, thepha imakrofoni ukuze ukhulume
status.askAnother: Thepha imakrofoni ukuze ubuze omunye umbuzo

errors.permissionDeniedIos: Ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni kunqatshiwe. Nika amandla kokuthi Izilungiselelo > Ellie.
errors.permissionDenied: Ukufinyelela kwemakrofoni kunqatshiwe. Sicela unikeze imvume.
errors.recognition: Angizange ngikubambe lokho. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.backend: Isevisi ayitholakali okwamanje. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.rateLimited: Sicela ulinde kafushane bese uzama futhi.
errors.timeout: Isicelo siphelelwe yisikhathi. Sicela uzame futhi.
errors.wakeWordUnavailable: Igama lokuvusa alitholakali, thepha imakrofoni ukuze ukhulume.

micA11y.listening: Yeka ukulalela. Thepha kabili ukuze uqedele ukukhuluma.
micA11y.speaking: U-Ellie uyakhuluma. Thepha kabili ukuze umise.
micA11y.error: Iphutha: {{message}}. Thepha kabili ukuze uzame futhi.
micA11y.idle: Buza u-Ellie umbuzo. Thepha kabili ukuze uqale ukukhuluma.

warnings.microphonePermissionRequired: Imvume yemakrofoni iyadingeka ku-Hey Ellie. Thepha imakrofoni ukuze ukhulume.
warnings.wakeWordUnavailableTapToTalk: Igama lokuvusa alitholakali, thepha imakrofoni ukuze ukhulume.

offlineFallback.shiftTodayOff: Namuhla uphumule, {{userName}}! Phumula futhi uvuselele amandla.
offlineFallback.shiftsThisWeek: Kuleli sonto: amashifu emini angu-{{dayCount}}, amashifu ebusuku angu-{{nightCount}} nezinsuku zokuphumula ezingu-{{offCount}}.
offlineFallback.shiftsThisWeekThreeShift: Kuleli sonto: amashifu asekuseni angu-{{morningCount}}, amashifu antambama angu-{{afternoonCount}}, amashifu ebusuku angu-{{nightCount}} nezinsuku zokuphumula ezingu-{{offCount}}.
offlineFallback.patternSummaryRotating: Iphethini yakho ingamashifu emini angu-{{dayCount}}, amashifu ebusuku angu-{{nightCount}}, bese kuba nezinsuku zokuphumula ezingu-{{offCount}}.
offlineFallback.patternSummaryThreeShift: Iphethini yakho ingamashifu asekuseni angu-{{morningCount}}, amashifu antambama angu-{{afternoonCount}}, amashifu ebusuku angu-{{nightCount}}, bese kuba nezinsuku zokuphumula ezingu-{{offCount}}.
offlineFallback.patternSummaryFifo: Iphethini yakho ingu-{{workDays}} izinsuku esizeni bese kuba ngu-{{restDays}} izinsuku zokuphumula.

notices.offlineRecognitionUnavailable: Ukufaka ngezwi ungaxhunyiwe ku-inthanethi akutholakali kule divayisi manje.
notices.audioUnavailable: Izimpendulo zomsindo azitholakali manje. Usengafunda impendulo ka-Ellie.

prep.fatigueCritical: Ingozi yokukhathala ibucayi. Zinike isikhathi esengeziwe.
prep.title: Isikhathi sokulungela, {{name}}

commute.title: Hamba manje
commute.body: Hamba manje ukuze ufike ngesikhathi ku-{{shiftType}} yakho. Iqala ngo-{{startTime}}.

briefing.title: Umbiko ususondele
briefing.body: Umbiko uqala emizuzwini engu-15 ngaphambi kwe-{{shiftType}} yakho ngo-{{startTime}}.

postShift.title: Kuhambe kanjani?
postShift.body: Ihambe kanjani i-{{shiftType}} yakho? Bhala izinga lamandla akho ku-Ellie.

fatigue.title: Isexwayiso sokukhathala esibucayi
fatigue.body: {{shiftType}} yakho iqala ngo-{{startTime}}, kodwa idatha yakho yokulala ikhombisa ukukhathala okubucayi. Phumula manje uma ukwazi.

backToBack.title: Kuzayo amashifu asebusuku angu-{{count}}
backToBack.body: Unamashifu asebusuku angu-{{count}} alandelanayo aqala ngo-{{shiftDate}}. Beka ukuphumula kuqala.

shortTurnaround.title: Kuzayo ukuphumula okufushane
shortTurnaround.body: Kunehora elingu-{{gapHours}} kuphela phakathi kwe-{{previousShiftType}} yakho ne-{{nextShiftType}} elandelayo ngo-{{shiftDate}}. Hlela ukuphumula kwakho.

flyOut.title: Usuku lokubuyela ekhaya
flyOut.body: Namuhla ubuyela ekhaya. Qedela ukudlulisa umsebenzi, pakisha izinto zakho, uhambe ngokuphepha.

travelTomorrow.title: Usuku lokuhamba kusasa
travelTomorrow.body: Kusasa uya esizeni nge-{{shiftType}} yakho. Pakisha izinto zakho futhi uhlole amadokhumenti akho namhlanje kusihlwa.
